reason: Check implementation against edit-plan validation, exporter fallback, ffmpeg command, and environment variable contracts.
Verify typed contracts, config ownership, no silent schema drift, explicit UTF-8 file handling where applicable, and focused test coverage.
Verify malformed/missing manifest and missing local clip paths are recoverable skips rather than pipeline crashes.
Verify skip and lifecycle logs remain compact, component-scoped, and machine-greppable.
Verify config-to-planner-to-exporter data flow survives round-trip and layer boundaries validate the right fields.
